home.services.title: Everything Your Business Needs to Get Online and Grow
home.services.subtitle: From design to launch and beyond — we handle every step so you don't have to.
home.svc.0.description: We design pixel-perfect, modern websites tailored to your brand. No generic templates — each site is built around what makes your business unique.
home.svc.1.description: Over 70% of your customers browse on mobile. We build sites that look and perform flawlessly on every screen — phone, tablet, or desktop.
home.svc.2.description: We optimize your site so customers nearby find you first. Google Maps, local search, Google Business Profile — all set up and tuned for your city.
home.svc.3.description: Hosting, security updates, backups, and content edits — all handled by us. Your website always works, always up-to-date, without you worrying about tech.
home.process.title: From First Chat to Live Website in Days
home.process.subtitle: A clear, transparent process with no surprises. You're always in the loop.
home.step.0.title: Free Preview First
home.step.0.description: We research your business and build a personalized demo website before any commitment. You see exactly what you're getting.
home.step.1.title: Design & Refinement
home.step.1.description: We tailor the design to your brand — colors, fonts, photos, and copywriting. You review and request changes until it's perfect.
home.step.2.title: Development & SEO
home.step.2.description: We build the final site on our fast, secure infrastructure with mobile optimization and local SEO baked in from day one.
home.step.3.title: Launch & Grow
home.step.3.description: We go live, set up your Google Business Profile, and stay by your side with ongoing updates and support whenever you need it.
home.projects.title: Real Local Businesses, Real Results
home.projects.subtitle: See how Polish businesses transformed their online presence with Hazelgrouse Studio.
home.features.title: What You Get with a Hazelgrouse Website
home.features.subtitle: Everything that matters for a local business going online — built in, no extras.
home.testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
home.testimonials.subtitle: Real business owners, real results.
home.faq.title: Questions We Hear All the Time
home.faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
home.faq.q0: Can I really see the website before paying?
home.faq.a0: Yes — that's how we work. We research your business and build a personalized demo site for free. You see the real thing before you commit to anything. No obligations.
home.faq.q1: How long does it take to launch?
home.faq.a1: Most websites go live within 5–7 business days after you approve the design. Larger or more complex projects may take 2–3 weeks.
home.faq.a2: We do. Your monthly plan includes fast hosting, security, automatic backups, and content updates whenever you need them. You just send us a message.
home.faq.q3: Will my website show up on Google?
home.faq.a3: Yes. Every website we build includes local SEO setup and Google Business Profile configuration. We make sure customers in your area can find you.
home.faq.q4: Can I edit the website myself?
home.faq.a4: You don't need to — we handle all edits as part of your monthly plan. But if you'd prefer a content management system so you can make changes yourself, we can build that in.
home.cta.title: See Your New Website Before You Pay a Single Złoty
home.cta.subtitle: We'll build a personalized demo for your business — for free.
svc.0.title: Website Design

svc.1.description: Your customers browse on their phones. We build websites that look and work perfectly on every screen size — from mobile to desktop.

proj.0.title: Elektryk Kowalski — Electrical Services
proj.0.description: A solo electrician with no web presence. We built a fast, local-SEO-optimized site in under a week. He now gets 40+ monthly inquiry calls from Google.
proj.0.short: From zero web presence to 40+ monthly leads via Google. Built and launched in 5 days.
proj.1.title: Złoty Kłos — Artisan Bakery
proj.1.description: A family bakery relying solely on word-of-mouth. We created an elegant site with online pre-orders, which doubled their daily customer traffic.
proj.1.short: Elegant site with online pre-orders. Customer traffic doubled in the first month.
proj.2.title: FitCity Studio — Fitness & Yoga
proj.2.description: A gym with an outdated site losing clients to competitors. New mobile-first design with an online class schedule reduced phone calls by 70%.
proj.2.short: Modern mobile-first site with class schedule. Sign-ups up 30%, phone calls down 70%.
proj.3.title: MedPlus Clinic — Private Healthcare
proj.3.description: A private clinic invisible to local patients online. New site with appointment booking form brought 35 new patients in the first month.
proj.3.short: New site with appointment booking form. 35 new patients registered in month one.
feat.0.title: Get Found on Google
feat.0.description: Local SEO and Google Business Profile setup so customers searching nearby discover your business first.
feat.1.title: Professional First Impression
feat.1.description: A polished, modern website signals credibility and trust — before a customer even picks up the phone.
feat.2.title: Works on Every Phone
feat.2.description: 70%+ of local searches happen on mobile. Your site will look perfect and load instantly on any device.
feat.3.title: Blazing Fast Loading
feat.3.description: Slow websites lose customers. We host on fast infrastructure so your site loads in under 1 second.
feat.4.title: No Tech Skills Needed
feat.4.description: We handle everything — from hosting to updates. You run your business, we run your website.
feat.5.title: See It Before You Pay
feat.5.description: We build your personalized demo site before any commitment. Zero risk, full transparency.

testi.0.title: Piotr Kowalski, Electrician — Warsaw
testi.0.description: I was skeptical at first, but they showed me the finished website before I paid anything. Now I get 40 calls a month from Google. Best investment I made.
testi.1.title: Anna Nowak, Owner — Złoty Kłos Bakery
testi.1.description: They built our site in less than a week and it looks absolutely beautiful. We now have customers pre-ordering online every day. The investment paid off within a month.
testi.2.title: Marcin Wiśniewski, FitCity Studio
testi.2.description: Our old website was embarrassing. The new one is fast, looks great on mobile, and now people actually find us on Google Maps. Sign-ups went up 30%.
testi.3.title: Dr. Katarzyna Zielińska — MedPlus Clinic
testi.3.description: Professional, fast, and reliable. They handled everything — design, hosting, even the Google Business profile. We had 35 new patients within the first month.
about.hero.title:
We Build Websites
for Real Businesses
about.hero.subtitle: We're a Warsaw-based web studio helping local Polish businesses get online, get found, and grow.

about.stat.0.label: Businesses Online
about.stat.1.label: Average Launch Time
about.stat.2.label: Free Preview First
about.story.title: Great local businesses deserve great websites
about.story.content: We started Hazelgrouse Studio because we kept seeing the same problem: excellent local businesses — skilled tradespeople, passionate restaurateurs, dedicated healthcare providers — losing customers to competitors with better websites. We built a system that lets us create personalized, professional websites fast and affordably. Our philosophy is simple: you see the finished product before you pay. No risk, no surprises, no generic templates.
about.values.title: What drives us
about.val.0.title: Transparency
about.val.0.description: You see the finished website before you pay anything. No hidden fees, no nasty surprises.
about.val.1.title: Speed
about.val.1.description: Most sites launch within a week. Local businesses can't afford to wait months.
about.val.2.title: Simplicity
about.val.2.description: We handle all the technical complexity. You focus on running your business.
about.val.3.title: Local Focus
about.val.3.description: We specialize in Polish local businesses. We know your market and your customers.
about.comp.title: No Website vs. Hazelgrouse Website
about.comp.subtitle: See the real difference a professional web presence makes for a local business.
about.comp.r0.left: Invisible to customers searching on Google
about.comp.r0.right: Found instantly on Google Maps and local search
about.comp.r1.left: Lost to competitors with better online presence
about.comp.r1.right: Stand out with a professional, modern design
about.comp.r2.left: Phone rings less, word of mouth only
about.comp.r2.right: Steady stream of new inquiries and leads
about.comp.r3.left: Customers can't find your hours or location
about.comp.r3.right: All information accessible 24/7 from any device
about.comp.r4.left: No credibility signal for new customers
about.comp.r5.left: Missing out on the 80% who search before buying
about.comp.r5.right: Capture every potential customer in your area

about.faq.title: Common questions
about.faq.q0: What types of businesses do you work with?
about.faq.a0: We work with all kinds of local businesses — tradespeople, restaurants, clinics, salons, gyms, shops, and more. If you serve local customers, we can help.
about.faq.a1: Just reach out via our contact form. We'll research your business and build a free personalized demo — no commitment required.
about.faq.a2: Absolutely. We work with businesses across Poland. Everything is handled remotely — design reviews, approvals, and ongoing support are all done online.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information about personal data processing
privacy.a0: The data controller is Hazelgrouse Studio. Data is processed in accordance with applicable laws, including GDPR (RODO).
privacy.a1: We collect data provided by users in contact forms (name, email address) and technical data necessary for the proper functioning of the website.
privacy.q2: For what purposes do we process data?
privacy.a2: Data is processed for the purpose of handling contact inquiries and providing services.
privacy.q3: What rights does the user have?
privacy.a3: Users have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict processing, data portability, and the right to object to processing.
